name: Snell
description: Snell is a lightweight encrypted proxy protocol server designed for Surge clients. This container installs Snell Server v5.0.1 with a generated listen port and PSK.

notes.text: The listen port and PSK are generated during installation and stored in /etc/snell/snell-server.conf.
Client format: snell, <container-ip>, <port>, psk = <psk>, version = 5, reuse = true
